scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-prisma-schema-compat.mjs && prisma generate && next build
scripts.db:deploy:safe: node scripts/ensure-prisma-schema-compat.mjs && prisma db push --accept-data-loss && (prisma db execute --schema prisma/schema.prisma --file prisma/migrations/20260711000000_add_missing_columns_for_push/migration.sql 2>&1 || true) && (prisma db execute --schema prisma/schema.prisma --file prisma/migrations/20260711000100_restore_dropped_columns/migration.sql 2>&1 || true) && (prisma db execute --schema prisma/schema.prisma --file prisma/migrations/20260712000000_fix_backup_audit_fks_and_errorlog_columns/migration.sql 2>&1 || true) && tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.db:deploy:dangerous: node scripts/ensure-prisma-schema-compat.mjs && prisma db push --accept-data-loss && tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.setup: npm run validate:env && npm run db:deploy:safe
scripts.check: npm run validate:env && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
